title: Protocol Prying: zero-click vulns in AirDrop and Quick Share
abstract: Protocol Prying: zero-click vulns in AirDrop and Quick Share has earned its GitHub stars through solid execution on code generation, debugging, and CI/CD automation. A genuine productivity multipli...
abstract_zh: Protocol Prying: zero-click vulns in AirDrop and Quick Share 这个工具在GitHub上热度很高，不是因为营销做得好，是真的好用。代码生成、调试辅助、部署自动化，一条龙搞定。
